summary: Retest iteration 3 for marketplace/viewings fixes. Both fixes from iteration 2 verified PASS. (1) POST /api/auth/register {role:'prospect'} now returns 400 with helpful message ('Prospect accounts are created automatically when you book a viewing on the marketplace.') — previously-failing test_register_prospect_role_rejected now PASSES. (2) Frontend no longer crashes on FastAPI 422: formatApiError() correctly stringifies the detail array; submitting invalid phone='abc' shows toast 'unit_id: Field required' (etc) and dialog remains usable — no ErrorBoundary triggered, no white CRA overlay. ErrorBoundary file exists and is wired into App.js. Regression: backend test_rental_management.py 34/34 PASS, test_marketplace_viewings.py 20/20 PASS (was 19/20). Landlord login + properties + bills pages all render without errors. HOWEVER, the end-to-end booking confirmation panel could initially NOT be reached: the frontend was missing `unit_id` in the POST /public/viewings payload (line 146 MarketplaceDetail.jsx sent only `form`, which has no unit_id). The previous iteration could not see this bug because the app crashed on 422 before the message rendered. I applied a 1-line fix `{ ...form, unit_id: listing.id }`, after which the booking flow completed end-to-end: STK push → demo callback ~4s → confirmation panel rendered with Receipt DEMO044228, property 'Riverside Apartments · Unit A-101', address 'Riverside Drive, Westlands, Nairobi', caretaker 'James Mwangi 0722111222', landlord 'Demo Landlord 254700000001', prospect email + password shown. Subsequent prospect login worked; /dashboard showed Total Bookings=1/Scheduled=1/Awaiting=0/Completed=0; /viewings listed the booking with property_address.

integration_issues.issue: form state never included unit_id, so POST /public/viewings always returned 422 'unit_id: Field required'. Was hidden in iter 2 by the toast crash. Fixed inline by testing agent: spread `{ ...form, unit_id: listing.id }` into the api.post payload (line 146).

issues: Date input still uses native browser picker with min=today; past-date rejection appears via native tooltip not the form's error UI. Carried over from iter 2, low priority.

action_items: Confirm the unit_id payload fix in /app/frontend/src/pages/MarketplaceDetail.jsx line ~146 is acceptable and keep it. Without it the entire UI booking flow is unusable (any submit returns 422).
(Optional, carried) Consider replacing native date picker with shadcn calendar to surface min-date errors in the form UI instead of via the browser tooltip.
critical_code_review_comments: MarketplaceDetail.jsx BookViewingDialog: the form state object was decoupled from listing.id which caused the 422 loop. Worth adding a small unit test or a runtime assertion in api.js that POST /public/viewings always carries unit_id.

formatApiError() in lib/api.js is a clean, defensive helper — recommend using it as the canonical pattern across the codebase for all toast.error sites; sweep confirmed it is already applied in Login/Register/Properties/Bills/Tenants/Caretakers/Issues/MarketplaceDetail.
ErrorBoundary is wired correctly in App.js (line 38/64); good safety net even with formatApiError in place.
auth_router.register now correctly rejects prospect role with a user-friendly message that points to the marketplace booking flow.

Carried from iter 2 (still applicable, not blocking): viewings_router.book_viewing inserts the viewing before stk_push — non-demo stk_push failures will leave orphan 'pending_payment' rows. Add a sweeper or rollback.
Carried from iter 2 (still applicable): viewings_router.public_listings uses `if max_rent:` so max_rent=0 is silently ignored. Edge case.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the validated flows (marketplace browse, listing detail, booking submit invalid+valid, confirmation panel, prospect login, prospect dashboard stats, prospect /viewings list, landlord login + properties + bills pages)

test_credentials: Landlord: land@demo.com / demo123. Prospect created during test: test_uiok_1779511342@demo.com / uF3DweRaiK (working at time of test).
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest creates+cleans TEST_mkt_* prefixed data. Frontend test left one prospect (test_uiok_1779511342@demo.com) with one scheduled viewing on the seeded Riverside A-101 unit — harmless leftover.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iter 2 bugs are FIXED and verified. Additional 1-line fix applied during iter 3: MarketplaceDetail.jsx line 146 now sends `{ ...form, unit_id: listing.id }` to POST /public/viewings (previously missing unit_id caused 422 on every UI submit). Regression suites: /app/backend/tests/test_rental_management.py (34) + /app/backend/tests/test_marketplace_viewings.py (20). All green. UI flow validated end-to-end: marketplace browse → listing detail → invalid submit (no crash, toast shows) → valid submit → polling → confirmation panel → prospect login → /dashboard (prospect stats: total_viewings/scheduled/pending/completed) → /viewings (booked listing with property_address). Landlord flows render correctly.
rca of the issue: Iter 2 RCA confirmed mitigated. New finding during iter 3: BookViewingDialog form state had no unit_id key, and submit() posted `form` verbatim — so every UI booking request omitted unit_id and got 422. With formatApiError now in place, the 422 toast 'unit_id: Field required' immediately revealed the root cause that the iter 2 crash had been hiding. Fix: spread listing.id into the payload at the post site.
